info.english_meaning: to seek help to beg to irritate to bless to master
info.hindI_arTa: yAcanA karanA rogI honA SrImAn honA ASIrvAda denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: upatApaH- jvaraprayuktA pIqA  ESvaryam - sampattiH  ASIH - ASAsanam  'ASizi nATaH ' iti vArtikena ASIrarTe Atmanepadam  yAYcopatApESvaryArTezu parasmEpadam  dvikarmakoyaM yAYcArTe

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'mARavakamupanATati aNga putrakADIzva' (pA0 2355 sUtravfttO pratyudAharaRam) upanATati yAcate upacCandayati rAjAnamupanATati yAcate prArTayate
